title: Validator Chain · 12-check
description: The 12-check validator chain · 7 critical + 5 advisory. Critical failures block deed issuance. Advisory failures attach to the receipt but do not block. Mirrors docs/doctrine/13_validator_chain_doctrine.md.

subject_id.description: The record (receipt id · cell id · engagement id) being validated

id.description: C01-C07 for critical · A01-A05 for advisory

note.description: Why the check passed or failed

evidence_pointer.description: Reference to the evidence record consulted

critical_passed.description: Count of critical checks passed (must == 7 to advance)

advisory_passed.description: Count of advisory checks passed (does not gate)

advance_to_label.description: Routing label produced by the chain

validator_model.description: Model id used for any judge-style checks
